query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "measuring epistemic resilience of llms under misleading medical contex" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (f) as it addresses the core mechanism of "misleading information" (misinformation) in the context of LLMs, which is the fundamental construct underlying the user's specific focus on "epistemic resilience" against "misleading medical contexts."
